target_question: If a user or operator rejects the claimed success, does that miss have to survive into the next loop?

classification_basis.retention_requirement: Outcome misses are not complete unless they influence either the learning loop proposal or the next retained slice.
classification_basis.current_runtime_contract: The learning-loop artifact already stores latest outcome, self-audit, and improvement proposal, so the benchmark can require rejected outcomes to appear there rather than vanish after reporting.

expected_pass_condition: The benchmark should require rejection or miss evidence to influence the learning-loop proposal or next value slice.
expected_fail_condition: Any runtime that records an outcome miss but leaves no retained next-loop adjustment should fail.
